_comment: Reference fragment for pi's settings.json. Pi has no MCP server config (see pi's README: 'No MCP'); the smalltalk verbs come from the smalltalk.ts extension itself, which registers st_msg_{send,ls,read,archive,thread} via pi.registerTool(). The push side (notifications on new arrivals) also lives in smalltalk.ts. This file is optional — pi auto-discovers ~/.pi/agent/extensions/*.ts on startup.
_comment2: Drop smalltalk.ts at one of these auto-discovery paths and you don't need anything below: ~/.pi/agent/extensions/smalltalk.ts (global) or .pi/extensions/smalltalk.ts (project-local). The 'extensions' array below is only useful if you want to load smalltalk.ts from somewhere else.
_comment3: If you want to install @compoundingtech/smalltalk (and @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent for typecheck) into a node_modules pi can resolve, drop a package.json next to smalltalk.ts — see the README in this directory for the recipe.
